case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ELIZABETH ZAMOS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-04-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-08-2015 -***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** BRANDON TANG APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH ZAMOS APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT.
